sections.paragraph:
εὑρετέος, α, ον(Thu 3, 45, 4) to be discovered / found out πῶς πίστ[ις] εὑρ[ετ]έ̣[α] how faith is to be discerned Ox 1081, 32f (cp. SJCh 90, 9–11, w. difft. syntax).—DELG s.v. εὑρίσκω.

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

Ox Ox = POxy, but refers to fragments of documents esp. relating to the lexical data base—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

SJCh SJCh = Sophia Jesu Christi—List 1

difft. difft. = different(ly)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 411
